message:
test(evidence-replay): add missing ReplayViolationType variant assertions

Add six missing variant assertions to violation_type_display_all_variants
test: OutcomeDivergence, ArtifactHashMismatch, ChainHashMismatch,
SequenceGap, TimestampMonotonicityViolation, and EntryTruncated. Move
the misplaced EntryTruncated assertion to its correct enum position.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
